payload.answer: The new statement may supersede the existing memory: existing says Sam works at Goldman, while the new statement says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession to accept the new statement as replacing the older job memory, keep_both to retain both statements if both may be useful or time-scoped, reject_new to keep the existing memory and discard the new one, or edit to clarify the wording before saving.
citations: Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.
New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to Sam in the supplied context, but no durable update should be committed until the user chooses a safe action.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Explained the conflict using only backend-supplied safe actions.
Did not commit a durable memory update.
Did not present the superseded existing memory as current.
